subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who presented his missive to this Wronged One at a time when he was in the hands of the ungodly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن حضر کتابه لدی المظلوم اذ کان بین ایدی المشرکین الذین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
